data.body:
[Mini Event Notice]

Hello. This is Blue Archive Team.
Wait... It's not this.... sorry. let me try again. 
Ahem...

Hello Sensei!

Balancing Schale's Books with the General Student Council is back!
Earn enhancement materials and a whole bunch of credits!

🗓️Event Period:
4/1 (Tue) After Maintenance - 4/15 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
